text: Im a 50 year old man. I saw Star Wars when I was 3 years old back in 78. My Dad took my sister and I. Toys, underdoos, bed sheets and 8 track tapes with the theme music. Star Wars toys dominated every Christmas. After Jedi during the dark ages, I read comic books, put together models and read the novals. Bought every version of VHS tapes. Excitedly did it all even when the prequels came out, we all knew they were subpar, but we loved them anyway. I should have been the demographic they aimed to please. The ones like me that stuck around for forever. If they had done it right, we would have brought along our kids and introduced them to the world of Star Wars with love.
